title: Research Paper Overview
scenario: Write a 75-word summary of a research paper. The summary should include the paper title, a brief overview of the research methodology, and a concluding sentence with the paper's key findings.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone of the summary is formal and professional.
Verify if the summary accurately represents the research paper's main points and methodology.
Check if the summary is under 75 words.
